case_title: ASHLEY SMITH et al VS. DONALD FRIEDMAN

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DONALD HEARING SET FOR AUG-08-2011 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED ($35.00 FEE FOR SERVICE)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: JUL-23-2011 (SERVICE FEE $32.00) AS TO DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, DONALD

BENCH LETTER ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2011; JUDGMENT DEBTOR DONALD FRIEDMAN FAILED TO APPEAR. WARRANT OF ATTACHMENT ORDERED ISSUED. BAIL SET AT 500.00. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING IS REPORTED. (506)
